content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (ICM/RND from Topic A) can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only surprising, unresolvable experiences get stored long-term instead of all encountered data. This creates a self-organizing memory system that grows only with information that actively improves the agent’s out-of-distribution generalization.
